# Advice for new programmers

Try few plotting libraries, but master one plotting library at the beginning. Python (as most open-source languages) have multiple plotting libraries, each following a different philosophy or paradigm. While this offers variety, it can also be overlwhelming to new programmers. As with any library you need to learn its syntax. The Bokeh library has great documentation, clean syntax, plot interactivity, and research quality visuals. The Holoviews library is built on top of Bokeh, so we will use these two libraries in the book.
